SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-31-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF BAO YUAN TAN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER BENJAMIN GIANG.
